info.title: Brightspace Valence API
info.description: D2L Brightspace Learning Management System API (Valence). Provides programmatic access to manage users, courses, enrollments, grades, content, discussions, quizzes, and other LMS functionality.

tags.name: Authentication
tags.description: API version and auth token management
